markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 11
#### Article 48. Registration of Vessels
##### § 2254 — Registration record

Upon the issuance of a registration for a vessel, as provided in this article, the commissioner shall enter upon the records of the department the registration of such vessel under the registration number assigned to such vessel as provided in this article, and in any other manner which he deems appropriate.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
